policy.text: Always handle boundary cases explicitly—especially empty inputs—and return the contract’s sentinel value instead of calling an operation that requires nonempty data.

curve.lesson: Always handle boundary cases explicitly—especially empty inputs—and return the contract’s sentinel value instead of calling an operation that requires nonempty data.
Validate conversion inputs and return the specified failure sentinel (such as `None`) instead of letting parsing exceptions escape.
Infer output-order requirements from the tests and return unique values in the expected sorted order rather than preserving input order.

lessons.lesson: Always handle boundary cases explicitly—especially empty inputs—and return the contract’s sentinel value instead of calling an operation that requires nonempty data.
